name: Grilled Chicken with Peach and Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peaches and fresh lemon juice in a medium bowl.
2. Place red bell pepper and onion in a medium non-stick saucepan.
3. Stir over medium-low heat until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 6 minutes.
4. Add curry powder and cayenne pepper to the saucepan and stir for 1 minute.
5. Add brown sugar and stir until dissolved, about 2 minutes.
6. Add vinegar; stir for 2 minutes.
7. Add peach mixture and accumulated juices to the pan and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes.
8. Transfer to a bowl and cool completely. Season relish to taste with salt and pepper.
- Can be prepared up to 5 days ahead. Cover and refrigerate.
9. Mix chopped cilantro into the relish.
10. Prepare grill.
11. Season chicken with salt and pepper. Grill until just cooked through, about 5 minutes per side.
12. Cut chicken into thin diagonal slices.
13. Arrange on plates; surround with peach relish.
